parameters.prompt: One fully visible centered photorealistic industrial spacecraft with empty gray margin on every edge. Compact 28 m frontier courier: blunt faceted pressure hull, 16 m beam, 7 m tall, two-deck core. Orthographic front, rear and left-side views of the exact same ship; one complete ship per image, never cropped, no neighboring objects. Armored nose cockpit, circular port airlock collar, integrated bilateral engine pods, RCS clusters, radiators, landing-gear bays, layered off-white metal and carbon panels. NASA-real engineering. No wings, tail, weapons, text, logos, stand, ground or scenery.

strengths: front, rear, and side views describe one consistent compact pressure hull
side boarding collar, cockpit glazing, engine modules, RCS, and landing structure are readable
source proportions can be normalized to the authored 28 m by 16 m by 7 m envelope
surface language supports separate structural, thermal, glazing, and service materials

input_preparation.method: remove only partial neighboring-view edge pixels, then center the retained object on a transparent canvas at the original dimensions

reference_packet.name: Flight_Tech_Ship_Images_Complete.pdf
reference_packet.usage: non-literal inspiration for service access, systems zoning, cutaway logic, integrated propulsion, and landing hardware; no sheet or named design is reproduced
